underlying_goal: Scrape racefans.net team radio transcripts comprehensively and document session progress in a project checkpoint
friction_detail: Initial scraper regex missed editorial articles, old process wasn't killed causing duplicate downloads, checkpoint placed in wrong location, and brainstormed ideas were framed too prescriptively rather than as open design space.
brief_summary: User wanted comprehensive transcript scraping and a session checkpoint; got 347 transcripts and a restructured checkpoint after several rounds of correction on framing and conventions.
